positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical botanical and celestial diagram featuring interwoven forest mushrooms, delicate ferns, and glowing constellations. Use sophisticated etching and clean linework to define the flora, contrasting sharply against swirling, deep midnight blue and indigo nebulas. The aesthetic must be dark academia meets cosmic wonder, utilizing rich jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, violet) highlighted by ethereal gold and silver accents. The composition must be perfectly centralized, showcasing strong, recognizable silhouettes suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. Hyper-detailed vector illustration style, art deco elements, symmetrical, clean silhouette.
